critique: Step 1 is incorrect. The function f_select_row should be used to filter rows relevant to the question—in this case, rows where time is not over 3:00 (i.e., time <= 3:00) to identify the exception. Using f_select_row(*) selects all rows and fails to narrow the table to the pertinent entry, misapplying the function’s purpose.
